package.name: welding_supervisor
package.description:
Intent-to-skill mission controller for the ROBIN welding HRI PoC. Subscribes to /intents and dispatches to the corresponding skill action servers. Handles all 8 intent types: - MOVE_TO_HOME, MOVE_TO_ZONE, EXECUTE_SEAM, ESTOP (original) - START_PROCESS, REQUEST_AI_RECOMMENDATION, MANUAL_ADJUST, FINE_TUNE_MODEL (ROBIN dashboard buttons)
Implements the same MissionController pattern as ErgoBot_AI's llm_supervisor/mission_controller.py.
